mapper.sql: select user_id, nickname,name,id_number, id_number_hash, phone, phone_hash, password, avatar, points_balance, total_earned, total_consumed, continuous_days, last_sign_date, status, register_time, last_login_time, last_login_ip, del_flag from t_user
mapper.insert: insert into t_user(nickname,name,id_number, id_number_hash, phone, phone_hash, password, avatar, points_balance, total_earned, total_consumed, continuous_days, status, register_time, last_login_time, last_login_ip, del_flag) values(#{nickname},#{name},#{idNumber}, #{idNumberHash}, #{phone}, #{phoneHash}, #{password}, #{avatar}, coalesce(#{pointsBalance},0), coalesce(#{pointsBalance},0), 0, 0, coalesce(#{status},'0'), sysdate(), sysdate(), #{lastLoginIp}, '0')
mapper.update: update t_user set del_flag='2' where user_id in #{userId}
update t_user set points_balance = points_balance - #{points}, total_consumed = total_consumed + #{points} where user_id=#{userId} and points_balance >= #{points} and status='0' and del_flag='0'
update t_user set points_balance = points_balance + #{points}, total_earned = total_earned + #{points} where user_id=#{userId} and del_flag='0'
update t_user set status=#{status} where user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(points_balance),0) from t_user where del_flag='0'
select count(1) from t_user where del_flag='0'
